rationale: The only direct linkage is a DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.48.3.472) with no citation-context text, so there is no evidence of how substantively it is used in the citing paper. Although the topics differ (assortment organization vs. recycling message framing), the cited paper’s construal-level/mind-set theory could plausibly relate to the citing paper’s goal-specificity and visualization mechanisms, so it is not safe to drop as obvious mention-only.
